title: The Freaky Dweller
description: The most horrifying and freaky dweller is invading your world, can you kill the god that created him?
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3215e5a08e46dbc86bedca4432daf445b9ed665d.png)
![cool render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4104d7d0588adb7c8f35b9891f93f6a5f579cd25_0.webp)

# [**OFFICIAL MODPACK!!!**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/minecraft-freaky-edition)

The Freaky Dweller is a joke mod that parodies the overdone and stale "dweller" trend. The mod adds The Freaky Dweller, a rare hostile mob that will hunt you down for nefarious and questionable reasons. You may find his house in the forest, fight him, and use his head as a helmet or a potent crafting ingredient. 

Completing the advancements will set you on a dangerous path, turning you into a mad scientist on the road to summoning a deity beyond your understanding.

The fated final freak-off will put you face to face with a god. Do you have what it takes?
